creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
The port chinese/ttf2pt1 does not install itself when the command "make install" is run. The latest output lines are:

===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if print/ttf2pt1 already installed
scripts/inst_dir /usr/local/bin root bin 0755
scripts/inst_dir:No such file or directory

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/chinese/ttf2pt1 && make install
